title: zabelia onkocarpa
intro: Zabelia onkocarpa, also known as Korean boxwood or Korean box holly, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zabelia onkocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Zabelia onkocarpa is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it may also be used as a component in herbal remedies and supplements.
